title: phoebe umbelliflora
intro: Phoebe umbelliflora, also known as Chinese angelica tree, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving menstrual cramps, as well as acting as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
